original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: vercel-deploy
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel. Use when the user requests deployment actions like "deploy my app", "deploy and give me the link", "push this live", or "create a preview deployment". Do NOT use for deploying to Netlify, Cloudflare, or Render (use their respective skills).
original_frontmatter_snapshot.author: github.com/openai/skills
